contexts.context: …, we’re missing a way to say that an <mark>unsuccessful</mark> search operation on a sequnce should throw an error…
…only use case I’ve found for introducing errors when <mark>unsuccessfully</mark> searching a sequence is because it will surprise Haskell…
…(ordered vs unordered) and they’ve been spectacularly <mark>unsuccessful</mark>. Implementors ignore them, users don’t understand them, so…
